name: test_invalid_password_returns_400
description:
POST /login with wrong password → expected 400.

        KNOWN ISSUE: ReqRes demo API no longer validates passwords for known
        registered emails (e.g. eve.holt@reqres.in). It returns 200 + token
        with _meta.context='legacy_success' regardless of the password supplied.
        This test is marked xfail to document the regression without hiding it.
        A real production API must return 400/401 for wrong credentials.
descriptionHtml:
POST /login with wrong password → expected 400.

    KNOWN ISSUE: ReqRes demo API no longer validates passwords for known
    registered emails (e.g. eve.holt@reqres.in). It returns 200 + token
    with _meta.context='legacy_success' regardless of the password supplied.
    This test is marked xfail to document the regression without hiding it.
    A real production API must return 400/401 for wrong credentials.
statusMessage:
XFAIL ReqRes demo API changed behaviour: POST /login with a known email and wrong password now returns 200 + token instead of 400. The _meta.context field is 'legacy_success', confirming this is a read-only demo limitation — not a real auth success. Track: https://reqres.in — update if API behaviour is restored.

AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid password, got 429. Body: {"error":"rate_limit_exceeded","message":"You've hit the free-tier limit of 250 requests/day.","upgrade":{"message":"Lite ($5/mo): 10,000 requests/day with commercial use license. Building a backend? See Dev ($12/mo).","url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&endpoint=legacy_api&highlight=lite","pricing_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&highlight=lite"},"current_usage":{"requests_today":250,"daily_limit":250,"resets_at":"2026-05-12T00:00:00.000Z"},"limit":250,"remaining":0,"reset_at":1778544000,"resets_in":"14h 47m","reset_explanation":"Limits reset daily at midnight UTC","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&endpoint=legacy_api","recommended_plan":"dev","why_this_happened":"Free tier includes 250 requests/day. Upgrade for higher limits, persistent collections, auth, and logs.","tier":"free","_meta":{"powered_by":"ReqRes","docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/documentation","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade","example_url":"https://app.reqres.in/examples/notes-app","variant":"v1_b","message":"Too many requests. Back off, or use Projects for higher limits.","cta":{"label":"Get started","url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade"},"context":"rate_limited"}}
assert 429 == 400
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
